description: Configures SPF, DKIM and DMARC so a customer domain can send email through SendyPOP without changing existing website, MX or inbox records.
variableDescription: %spfRules%: SPF mechanisms authorized by SendyPOP without the v=spf1 prefix or all mechanism. %dkimSelector%: DKIM selector generated by SendyPOP. %dkimPublicKey%: DKIM public key generated by SendyPOP without PEM headers. %dmarcPolicy%: initial DMARC policy, usually none. %dmarcRua%: DMARC aggregate report mailbox controlled by the customer or SendyPOP.
